BOLT.notes: PICK #499 NEXT — [P1-12] cron Bearer auth non-constant-time comparison (Trace audit Appendix row K). Scope: (1) create src/lib/cron-auth.ts exporting requireCronSecret(req: Request) or requireCronSecret(authHeader: string | null) that: (a) extracts Bearer token from Authorization header, (b) reads env.CRON_SECRET, (c) uses crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(provided), Buffer.from(expected)) with pre-length-normalized buffers (pad to same length before compare to avoid length side-channel) or length-prefix compare, (d) returns boolean + optional 401 Response helper. (2) Migrate all 11 cron routes currently doing `=== env.CRON_SECRET`: src/app/api/cron/email-sync/route.ts, similar-items/route.ts, delivery-deadline/route.ts, win-back/route.ts, cross-sell/route.ts, browse-abandonment/route.ts, delivery-check/route.ts, new-arrivals/route.ts, review-request/route.ts, abandoned-carts/route.ts (grep `Bearer\|CRON_SECRET\|authorization` in src/app/api/cron returned 10 files — confirm 10 vs 11 during diff; if only 10 routes use Bearer auth, that's the full surface). Commit format: 'Cycle #NNNN: Bolt — Task #499 [P1-12]: extracted requireCronSecret() with timingSafeEqual, migrated N cron routes. tsc 0, lint 0w/0e (milestone preserved 23 consecutive), build green.'. Target: ~40 LoC single atomic commit. tsc clean, lint 0w/0e (MILESTONE PRESERVATION — target 23 consecutive commits). DO NOT touch cron route business logic — only the auth-header check. DO NOT add rate-limiting or other hardening in same commit. DO NOT modify CRON_SECRET env var name. AFTER #499 LANDS → #500 [P1-11] imap-sync participants: src/lib/imap-sync.ts persistParsedMessage re-reads EmailThread.participants (JSON) after insert — hoist the read OR convert to atomic JSON_SET-style append. Scope ~10 LoC. Commit fmt same pattern. THEN Bolt IDLE until (a) bectly clears #496 Phase 3/4 gates, (b) new Trace audit P0/P1, (c) new DevChat bug. Stability surfaces — do NOT modify: smtp-transport.ts getMailer/FROM_DEFAULT, src/lib/email/addresses.ts FROM map, layout.ts renderLayout signature, C4849 IMAP lib structure (only persistParsedMessage participants for #500), the hoisted getBaseUrl() usage introduced in 29a9911, the uploadToR2 {key,url} return shape introduced in 6f9e342 (already consumed by imap-sync + upload/route — preserve signature).

SAGE.notes: PICK #494 NEXT — Phase 2 of email brand redesign. Phase 1 SHIPPED (9c23a71): layout.ts created + 10 templates migrated to renderLayout. REMAINING in src/lib/email.ts — 11 raw `<!DOCTYPE html>` builders at lines 737/1124/1361/1466/1623/1731/1836/1925/2072/2239/2582. Map each builder to renderLayout({preheader, contentHtml}) or a `buildEmailLayout`-style helper. Expected builders: line 737 admin-new-order, 1124 newsletter/welcome-variant, 1361 review-request, 1466 delivery-check, 1623 new-arrival, 1731 browse-abandonment, 1836 cross-sell-follow-up, 1925 win-back, 2072 campaign, 2239 MOTHERS_DAY_BUILDERS (5 emails), 2582 CUSTOMS_BUILDERS (n emails). APPROACH: one builder per commit (OR two per commit if trivial <30 lines each) — atomic to dodge QA exit=143, preserve lint 0w/0e MILESTONE on every commit. For each builder: (1) lift innerContent out of DOCTYPE shell, (2) feed through renderLayout with matching preheader/title/eyebrow/CTA props, (3) preserve Czech diacritics + unsubscribe link (campaign/newsletter/browse-abandonment/win-back/cross-sell/MOTHERS_DAY/CUSTOMS are marketing-class → MUST have unsubscribe footer), (4) transactional (admin-new-order, review-request, delivery-check, new-arrival) skip unsubscribe. Commit fmt: 'Cycle #NNNN: Sage — Task #494 Phase 2a/2b/...: migrated <builder-name> to renderLayout. tsc 0, lint 0w/0e (milestone preserved), build green.'. DO NOT touch layout.ts structural API (renderLayout signature — Phase 1 stability surface). DO NOT touch smtp-transport.ts (Bolt #493). DO NOT re-add Resend. DO NOT touch non-email files. When all 11 migrated → mark #494 COMPLETE and Lead closes next cycle.
